name: dev-workflows
description: Agent workflow prompts for project bootstrapping, session management, and task lifecycle. Works with any codebase.

interface.shortDescription: Project bootstrap, session management, and task lifecycle workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Structured prompts for every stage of development: initialize a project or workspace, continue a session, plan and execute tasks, review code, ship hotfixes, audit a codebase, and hand off work cleanly.
defaultPrompt: I need to start working on a new codebase.
I want to resume work on an existing project.
